title: Set of 8 Mini Spatulas Makeup Scraper, MaehSab Silicone Reusable Tiny Thin Jar Scraper for Getting Last Lotion out, Rubber Makeup Long Spoon Bottle Scraper for Kitchen Food Beauty Make up, Black
description:
About this item
8 PIECES IN ONE PACK -There are 2 types of silicone mini spatulas with fashion red color, 8 pieces in total, which meet your different demand.
PREMIUM FOOD GRADE SILICONE-The silicone bottle scraper is made of 100% food grade silica, heat resistant, safe for food and makeup.
WHY YOU NEED IT? - It is a great tool to help you get last out when tall and slender bottle is almost up. No more waste.
MULTIPLE USE - Reusable Mini spatulas can be used in many occasions: make up or food bottle scraper; stirring paint; mix nail polish ect.
DIFFERENT SIZE - We have prepared 3 different sizes in one pack, long and short, you can always find the one you need.
reviews_5s: I ordered these spatulas to scrape the last drop of foundation from the Mac bottle I use because at $40 dollars a pop, I'm not leaving anything behind. The spatulas did the job and because of their different sizes, I can find other uses for them in the kitchen. So far, I've only used the smallest 2, but they wash well and really I'm satisfied with the product.Buen producto! Muy satisfechaIf you want to scrap out the very last dollop of lipstick etc these are the right gadjets. I also used one for applying small drops of glue in a tidy manner. Thanks.Son muy útiles, cómo vienen en diferentes tamaños pueden servir para varias medidas de frascos. Ahora ya no quedan reciduos en frasquitos de cremas, medicamentos o cosméticos, especialmente porque algunos son caros. Muy buena compra.C est se que j avait besoin pour une utilisation spécifique très bienI like that there are several sizes. Very useful.I use these for blending aroma chemicals and absolutely love them. They don't seem to leech smells at all which is really important. I also use one for getting the last bit of cosmetics out of containers which is so useful.They do the jobI bought these for mixing my acrylic paint instead of using popsicle sticks. I love them. They mix well and are easy to clean. The spatula end is firm, the spoon end is soft and flexible. The only con I can see, would be for the spoon ends to be less flexible, for better mixing power.Perfect for getting out the last little bit of lotion, foundation etc!
